title: Flag status-aware action buttons component
purpose: Displays appropriate action buttons (Resolve/Dismiss or Reopen) based on the flag's current status.
module_context: Exports a React functional component FlagActions that accepts flag data and action handlers as props, and renders conditional UI elements based on flag status.

steps.content: Determine if the flag is open or addressed.
IF the flag is open or addressed, render resolve and dismiss buttons.
IF the flag is resolved or dismissed, render the reopen button.
Return the appropriate set of action buttons based on flag status.
